title: Every checklist-* criterion in this Core Features dimension passes during the agent verifier run
No console.error or unhandled promise rejections appear in the browser log during the agent verifier session
Transactions list is static HTML only with no working create/edit/delete against shared state
App chrome navigates via real outbound links to other origins instead of in-app view state
Zustand holds transactions, chart tab, filters, and derived totals — shared across components
Implemented with React, Zustand, and Styled Components; no browser storage APIs for persistence
Uses localStorage or sessionStorage to persist transactions or filters
Manages the transactions collection only in component-local useState rather than Zustand
Ledger sidebar + metrics + chart + transactions density remains a reports workspace, not a marketing landing
Empty transactions state is visually present when the collection or filter result is empty
Shows only static chart mockups with a non-interactive transactions table
Required hover animations are present; chart tab and toast motion behave as specified
Chart/list mode switches update without full reload and keep hover feedback
Omits hover washes on rows or nav so the reports chrome feels static on pointer hover
